summary: Fit Page MakeMyTrip-style redesign testing complete. All 11 frontend tests passed (100%). The page loads correctly with the new design featuring hero section, category filter tabs, sort dropdown, service cards with images/prices/duration/Book buttons, detail modal with 'What's Included' and 'Why Concierge®' sections, heart/favorite toggle, and mobile responsive layout.

FRONTEND_TEST_01_page_load.details: Fit page loads correctly with MakeMyTrip-style design

FRONTEND_TEST_02_hero_section.details: Hero section displays 'Fit Paws, Happy Hearts' heading with background image, Explore Services and Shop Fitness Gear buttons

FRONTEND_TEST_03_category_filters.details: Category filter tabs work correctly - All (17), Assessment, Training (3), Weight Management, Therapy, Senior Care, Puppy, Agility, Wellness

FRONTEND_TEST_04_sort_dropdown.details: Sort dropdown works - Most Popular, Top Rated, Price: Low to High, Price: High to Low

FRONTEND_TEST_05_service_cards.details: 17 service cards display with images, titles, duration, descriptions, prices, and Book buttons

FRONTEND_TEST_06_heart_favorite_toggle.details: Heart/favorite icon toggles correctly - changes from white to red when clicked

FRONTEND_TEST_07_detail_modal.details: Clicking service card opens detail modal with service info, price, duration

FRONTEND_TEST_08_whats_included.details: 'What's included' section displays in modal with checklist items

FRONTEND_TEST_09_why_concierge.details: 'Why Concierge®' section displays in modal explaining the service benefits

FRONTEND_TEST_10_modal_buttons.details: 'Enrol Now' and 'Ask Concierge®' buttons present in modal with data-testid attributes

FRONTEND_TEST_11_booking_modal.details: Book button opens booking modal with form fields: Name, Phone, Email, Preferred Date, Fitness Goals, Additional Notes

FRONTEND_TEST_12_mira_suggests.details: 'Mira Suggests' popup appears when service is selected showing related products for cross-selling

FRONTEND_TEST_13_mobile_responsive.details: Mobile layout works correctly - hero stacks vertically, category tabs scroll horizontally, cards display in single column

features: Enrol Now and Ask Concierge buttons

critical_code_review_comments: MiraPillarRecommendations only renders when user is logged in (user && token) - non-logged-in users won't see personalized recommendations
Heart/favorite toggle is client-side only - favorites are not persisted to backend
ServiceDetailModal is defined inline in FitPage.jsx - could be extracted to separate component for reusability
seed_data_creation: None - used existing services and products data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fit page redesign with MakeMyTrip-style layout is complete and working. All features tested: category filters, sort dropdown, service cards with images/prices/Book buttons, detail modal with What's Included and Why Concierge sections, heart/favorite toggle, Mira Suggests cross-selling popup, booking modal with form fields, and mobile responsive layout. APIs working: /api/services?pillar=fit, /api/products?pillar=fit, /api/recommendations/dashboard.
